# Tareabox HyperFrames Catalog

> 133 video composition items for HyperFrames (HTML-based video framework):
> 61 blocks + 72 components. Free, by Natalie Digital (Natalie Abadie). See LICENSE.

## What this repo provides

Two types of items, both self-contained HTML files with embedded CSS, GSAP animations, and timeline data:

- **Blocks** (61) — full-screen scenes with their own background. Use as standalone composition.
- **Components** (72) — transparent overlays. Layer on top of any block, video, or composition.

Both come in vertical (1080×1920 for Reels/TikTok/Shorts) and horizontal (1920×1080 for YouTube) variants.

## Categories

**Blocks** (full scenes):
- **layout** — YouTube creator scenes (PIP, split-screen, lower thirds), video hero/hook/caption templates, tutorial layouts
- **conversationapp** — animated chat UI mockups (iMessage, WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, Instagram DM, Twitter, iOS/Android notifications)

**Components** (transparent overlays):
- **text** — typewriter, warp, neon, glitch, chapter reveals, kinetic typography
- **visual** — GIF stickers, callouts (tip/note/warning), indicators (zoom, timestamp, progress, keyboard shortcut)
- **data** — animated checklists, metric flip counters

## Install

Add to your project's `hyperframes.json`:
```json
{ "registry": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tareabox/tareabox-catalog-free/main/registry" }
```
Then:
```bash
npx hyperframes add <name>
```

Or `git clone` and copy items manually from `registry/blocks/{name}/` (blocks) or `registry/components/{name}/` (components).

## Live preview

All 133 items rendered: https://tareabox.com/hf-catalog-free/
